keywords.name: Me put name away name long ago. Now only blind prophet of ape people are.
keywords.prophet: Me is who in dreams speak to holy banana. Me divine the will of banana.
keywords.guardian: Me guard the forbidden land behind the great palisade. If any want to enter, he must ask me for transport.
keywords.forbidden: Me guard the forbidden land behind the great palisade. If any want to enter, he must ask me for transport.
keywords.Hairycles: Good ape he is. Has to work hard to make other apes listen but you helped a lot.
keywords.excalibug: Me not know. Me seldom have visions of not banana related objects.
keywords.bong: Our holy ancestor he is. Big as mountain. Lizards say they built palisade to keep him but we not believe ...
keywords.ape: Our people a lot to learn have. One day we might live in peace with you hairless apes, who knows.
keywords.lizard: The lizards evil and vengeful are. Ape people on guard must be.
keywords.hair: Me visions show hair in the far north west of forbidden land. Near coast look for signs of Bongs presence.

texts: Be greeted, friend of the apes.
You not should be here! You go! You go!

greetingPatterns.response: Be greeted, friend of the apes.
You not should be here! You go! You go!
Be greeted, friend of the apes.
